desc: Analyze the top three risks of running autonomous AI agents on a blockchain network
result: Top 3 risks: 1) Smart contract vulnerabilities - AI agents interacting with flawed contracts can lead to irreversible financial losses. 2) Uncontrolled autonomous spending - agents with wallet access may execute unintended or excessive transactions without human oversight. 3) Oracle manipulation - AI agents relying on external data feeds can be exploited through manipulated oracle inputs, leading to incorrect decisions recorded immutably on-chain.
